message:
Command `echo "$(date)"
pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" | head -1 && echo "LR: running" || echo "LR: DONE"
pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" | head -1 && echo "Yosys: running" || echo "Yosys: DONE"
echo ""
SYNTH_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis"
ls -lht "$SYNTH_DIR/" 2>/dev/null | head -15
echo ""
wc -l /tmp/yosys_drain.log 2>/dev/null
tail -5 /tmp/yosys_drain.log 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.
